pi_items.source: Live VM DB query: SELECT id, fullname, shortname FROM mdl_course WHERE shortname='NUR401' returned id=5, fullname='Clinical Pharmacology', shortname='NUR401'. Evidence: hard_tasks_evidence_logs/moodle_env/configure_tiered_assessment_pathway/04_nur401_course.txt

This is the name the agent must create. Verified that no quiz with this name pre-exists in NUR401 (0 quizzes at baseline). Evidence: 09_no_preexisting_activities.txt shows 'quizzes 0'. The task description instructs the agent to create a quiz with this exact name.

Live VM DB query confirmed: question_categories table has id=2, name='Pharmacology Fundamentals', contextid=27 (NUR401 course context), with 5 question_bank_entries linked. Evidence: 06_question_categories.txt and 07_questions.txt showing all 5 MCQ questions in 'ready' status.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring NUR401 (Clinical Pharmacology, course id=5 in Science category) as a tiered assessment pathway in Moodle 4.5.10+. The environment is pre-seeded with exactly 5 MCQ questions in the 'Pharmacology Fundamentals' question bank category (category id=2): (1) 'Cell Wall Synthesis Inhibitors' — correct answer: Penicillins, (2) 'ACE Inhibitor Mechanism' — correct answer: Block angiotensin-converting enzyme, (3) 'Fastest Absorption Route' — correct answer: Intravenous, (4) 'Clinical Trial Phases' — correct answer: Phase I, (5) 'Primary Metabolic Organ' — correct answer: Liver. Each question has 4 answer options with fraction=1.0 for correct and 0.0 for distractors. The agent must create 4 activities: (1) Quiz 'Drug Classification Exam' with timelimit=1800s (30 min), attempts=2, gradetopass=75, completion=automatic with passing grade (completion=2, completionpassgrade=1), using all 5 pre-loaded questions from the bank; (2) Page 'Pharmacokinetics Reading' with content about ADME principles, completion=view (completion=2, completionview=1); (3) Assignment 'Medication Safety Case Study' with online text submission, grade=100, gradetopass=60, completion=submit (completion=2, completionsubmit=1), with restrict access requiring completion of both the quiz (with passing grade) AND the page (the availability JSON in mdl_course_modules must contain the quiz and page cm_ids with 'completion' type); (4) Q&A forum 'Clinical Drug Interaction Analysis' with type='qanda', assessed=1 (Average of ratings), scale=5, completion=post (completionposts>=1 or completiondiscussions>=1), with restrict access requiring passing grade on the assignment (availability JSON must reference the assignment cm_id with 'grade' type). The gradebook must use weighted mean aggregation (aggregation code=10, enabled via grade_aggregations_visible='0,10,11,13' at site level) with 3 sub-categories: Foundation (weight=25% or 0.25), Application (weight=35% or 0.35), Synthesis (weight=40% or 0.40). Grade items must be moved into their respective categories. Course completion must be configured with at least 3 criteria rows in mdl_course_completion_criteria. Enrolled users: teacher1 (editingteacher), jsmith, mjones, awilson, bbrown (students). Login: admin / Admin1234! at http://localhost. The Moodle URL is http://localhost (NOT http://localhost/moodle). Sections 1-3 exist and are visible. At baseline: 0 quizzes, 0 pages, 0 assignments, 0 forums, 0 badges, 0 grade sub-categories, 0 course completion criteria. Default gradebook aggregation is 13 (Natural). Availability plugins installed: completion, date, grade, group, grouping, profile — all required restriction types are available.
